name: Sneha Kaushal

suggestions.text: Keep resume to 1-2 pages for best results
Tailor your resume for each job application

interview_questions.q: Explain database normalization (1NF, 2NF, 3NF).
interview_questions.tip: Use a real table example to show each normal form

interview_questions.q: What is the difference between git merge and git rebase?
interview_questions.tip: Merge preserves history, rebase creates linear history

interview_questions.q: Describe your experience working in a team.
interview_questions.tip: Mention collaboration tools, conflict resolution, code reviews

interview_questions.q: Explain OOP concepts (Inheritance, Polymorphism, Encapsulation, Abstraction).
interview_questions.tip: Give a real-world analogy for each — animal/dog for inheritance is classic

interview_questions.q: What is cross-validation and why is it important?
interview_questions.tip: Explain k-fold and how it gives reliable performance estimates

interview_questions.q: Explain the difference between lists, tuples, and sets in Python.
interview_questions.tip: Focus on mutability, ordering, and use-cases

interview_questions.q: How do you stay updated with new technologies?
interview_questions.tip: Mention specific sources: blogs, GitHub, courses, side projects

interview_questions.q: How do you optimize performance in a React application?
interview_questions.tip: Mention useMemo, useCallback, lazy loading, React.memo

interview_questions.q: What is the difference between == and === in JavaScript?
interview_questions.tip: Type coercion vs strict equality

interview_questions.q: How does Python's memory management work?
interview_questions.tip: Talk about garbage collection and reference counting

interview_questions.q: What is your greatest technical weakness?
interview_questions.tip: Pick a real weakness but show you're actively working on it

interview_questions.q: What is the difference between Abstract class and Interface in Java?
interview_questions.tip: Mention multiple inheritance, default methods in Java 8+

interview_questions.q: What is the GIL (Global Interpreter Lock) in Python?
interview_questions.tip: Mention threading limitations and multiprocessing as alternative

interview_questions.q: How do you resolve a merge conflict?
interview_questions.tip: Walk through the steps: identify, edit, stage, commit

interview_questions.q: What are React Hooks and why were they introduced?
interview_questions.tip: Compare with class components, mention useState/useEffect

interview_questions.q: Where do you see yourself in 5 years?
interview_questions.tip: Align with the company's growth — mention skills you want to develop

interview_questions.q: What is Context API and when would you use it over Redux?
interview_questions.tip: Talk about prop drilling problem and scale

interview_questions.q: How does async/await work under the hood?
interview_questions.tip: Connect to Promises and the event loop

interview_questions.q: What is event delegation in JavaScript?
interview_questions.tip: Explain bubbling and how it improves performance

interview_questions.q: Explain S3 storage classes and their use cases.
interview_questions.tip: Standard, IA, Glacier — cost vs access frequency

interview_questions.q: Explain Java's garbage collection mechanism.
interview_questions.tip: Mention JVM, heap, generations, and GC algorithms

interview_questions.q: What is a stored procedure and when would you use one?
interview_questions.tip: Compare with regular queries, mention security and reuse

interview_questions.q: What is a retrospective and what value does it add?
interview_questions.tip: Continuous improvement, team morale, process efficiency

interview_questions.q: What is the difference between supervised and unsupervised learning?
interview_questions.tip: Give 2 examples each and mention use cases

interview_questions.q: Explain the bias-variance tradeoff.
interview_questions.tip: Connect to underfitting/overfitting with visual intuition

text:
Sneha Kaushal
+91-7717623925|kaushalsneha36@gmail.com|GitHub|LinkedIn
PROFILE
Computer Science Engineering student with strong knowledge of Data Structures & Algorithms, Full Stack Development,
Cloud Computing, and Cybersecurity fundamentals. Experienced in building scalable web applications, REST APIs,
AI-powered systems, and real-time dashboards using Java, Python, React, Node.js, and Spring Boot. Passionate about
problem solving, secure software development, and AI-driven automation.
EDUCATION
Chitkara University, Punjab 2023 – 2027
B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering
CGPA: 8.32
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Programming Languages:Java, Python, JavaScript, SQL
Frontend:HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React.js
Backend & Frameworks:Node.js, Express.js, Spring Boot, Flask, REST APIs, Maven
Core Concepts:Data Structures & Algorithms, OOPs, DBMS, Computer Networks, Software Engineering, System Design,
SDLC, Agile
Cloud & Security:AWS, Cloud Computing, Network Security, Cybersecurity Fundamentals, TryHackMe, CyberChef
Tools:Git, GitHub, Postman, Selenium, Jira, API Testing
PROJECTS
AI Resume AnalyzerPython, Flask, AI, Scikit-learn
•Developed an AI-powered ATS Resume Analyzer using Python Flask and Machine Learning.
•Implemented PDF resume parsing using PyPDF2 and job description matching using TF-IDF and Cosine Similarity.
•Added ATS score calculation, grammar checking, missing skill detection, AI-generated suggestions, and resume summary
generation.
•Integrated AI APIs for resume improvement recommendations and bullet point enhancement.
AEGIS v3 – Global Multi-Domain Threat Detection PlatformReact, Node.js, Express, Socket.IO, Leaflet
•Developed a real-time threat intelligence dashboard for live monitoring and visualization.
•Integrated OpenSky and AISHub APIs for global air and maritime tracking.
•Implemented WebSocket-based live updates and AI-generated threat reports for intelligent monitoring.
E-Commerce PlatformJava, Spring Boot, Maven
•Built scalable backend APIs with secure authentication and product management features.
•Integrated database operations and implemented RESTful architecture principles.
•Applied modular backend design and API testing best practices for maintainability.
ACHIEVEMENTS
•Secured3rd Prize at CYBPRO-2025for an AI-based Cybersecurity project currently under patent filing process.
•Solved300+ coding problemson LeetCode focused on DSA and problem-solving.
•Built multiple full stack and AI-powered projects focused on automation and cybersecurity.
CERTIFICATIONS
•Java (Basic) Certification – HackerRank
•Introductory C Programming – Coursera
•IBM Cybersecurity Essentials – Coursera
•Introduction to Cloud Infrastructure – Microsoft
•AZ-900T00-A: Introduction to Cloud Infrastructure – Microsoft
STRENGTHS
Goal-Oriented•Quick Learner•Problem Solving•Resilient•Team Collaboration•Adaptability
